universe_usage_history.decision: Initial cast for the mta-ai-hackathon repo. T'Challa selected as Lead for calm authority, strategic continuity, and Wakandan institutional-memory framing aligned with the ralph (persistent memory) agent.

Judging app build session: hired 5 agents from bench to scaffold apps/judging/ (SWA + Functions + Cosmos). Stark (Architect) built infra/API. Parker (Frontend) built UI with MTA brand alignment. Okoye (Operations) built deployment scaffold. Banner (Tester) built Playwright suite. Maximoff (QA) performed gpt-4o → gpt-4.1 model sweep on root project. Session completed successfully with all 5 agents moving to Active status.
